notes: Accepted upstream #1493 baseline with local syntax and decimal artifact-cap enforcement repairs: SP8192 + 3-layer recurrence + parallel residuals + QK-Gain 5.25 + legal score-first TTT. Use as the active legal SOTA reference until a stronger canonical run is proven.
purpose: Run the accepted #1493 SP8192 legal SOTA baseline from root train_gpt.py without relying on the demoted #1791 GDN/FLA lane.
prerequisite: Download the SP8192 custom cache with `MATCHED_FINEWEB_REPO_ID=kevclark/parameter-golf MATCHED_FINEWEB_REMOTE_ROOT_PREFIX=datasets python data/cached_challenge_fineweb.py --variant sp8192`, then verify readiness with `python scripts/check_run_ready.py configs/h100/root_sp8192_pr1493_accepted_8xh100.json`.

slurm.setup_command: pip install brotli sentencepiece && pip install flash_attn_3 --no-deps --find-links https://windreamer.github.io/flash-attention3-wheels/cu128_torch291/

success_criteria: Reproduce the accepted #1493 baseline: final exact val_bpb near 1.0810, train/eval under 600s, total artifact bytes under 16,000,000, and no eval-time network or unscored-token adaptation.
timing_expectation: Accepted H100 lane only. Do not auto-launch; run manually on 8xH100 SXM after readiness passes.
